name: CLR DLL Loaded via Scripting Application
description: Detects the loading of Common Language Runtime (CLR) DLLs by scripting applications (mshta.exe, wscript.exe, and cscript.exe). These are legitimate Windows binaries, but this activity can indicate the execution of malicious .NET code within scripts. Adversaries may use this to bypass application control or execute code without compiling an executable.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the image load event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Image Load (7).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that loaded the DLL (e.g., 'wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'mshta.exe').

parameters.name: source_image
parameters.description: The full path to the scripting application that loaded the DLL.

parameters.name: image_loaded
parameters.description: The full path to the loaded CLR DLL (e.g., 'clr.dll', 'mscoree.dll', 'mscorlib.dll').

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
